visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: Bubble Sort Optimization
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Optimize the bubble sort to exit early if the array is already sorted, and use a shorter variable swap syntax.

solution.explanation: A `do-while` loop combined with a `swapped` flag is a common way to optimize bubble sort. The array destructuring `[a, b] = [b, a]` is the modern JS way to swap variables.
